from __future__ import annotations

from unittest.mock import patch


@patch("service.a")
@patch("service.b")
@patch("service.c")
@patch("service.d")
def test_function_stacks_too_many_mock_patch_decorators_positive(mock_d, mock_c, mock_b, mock_a) -> None:
    assert all([mock_a, mock_b, mock_c, mock_d])
